dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses off-the-shelf momentum ranking (not explicitly defined in source text). Translated entry conditions as: positive recent returns (momentum) AND above-average liquidity (vol_ratio_20). Exit triggered by negative returns or monthly rebalancing (30-day hold max). Strategy is long-only with no short positions. Parameters: NIFTY100 universe, monthly rebalancing frequency, 12-month lookback for persistence ranking.

source_rule_text: Monthly rebalanced long-only momentum portfolio using NIFTY100 constituents with near-term rebalancing
